title: Taylors Eye Witness 5pc Beech Look Presentation Knife Set - Brooklyn Anti-Bacterial Non Stick Grey Blades. Paring, All-Purpose, Chefs, Serrated Bread & Carving Knife with Bonus Knife Sharpener
features: 🔪 A GREAT KITCHEN SET: This set is a great addition to any collection of kitchen accessories, with 5 high quality knives that are made to be non-stick so there is no need to stop slicing to wipe any debris off your knife, it will simply slip away. These knives are also antibacterial so they are made to remain resistant to bacteria from raw foods, this means you and your family can stay safe whilst cooking. This set also comes with an easy to use sharpener to keep your knives in top shape.

🔪 A KNIFE FOR ANY JOB: This selection of kitchen tools gives you a reliable knife for whatever ingredient you're facing. The paring knife is great for small detail focused jobs, a versatile all-purpose knife that is balanced and built for a range of tasks, a long carving knife for handling and disjointing meat, a serrated bread knife for cutting up bread and pastry without crushing the food and a well made chef's knife that is perfect for chopping up large ingredients easily.

🔪 A GREAT STYLISH OPTION: When you are building your dream kitchen it is important to pick all the right pieces that fit your vision, you want quality products but you don't want to sacrifice style to get there. With this set you won't have to, thanks to the attractive pastel grey colouring of each of the blades, pairing beautifully with the matching bolsters and soft grip beech wood look handle. Plus this incredible set comes safely packaged in a simple but stylish presentation box.

🔪 GLOBAL REPUTATION: Taylor's Eye Witness was founded in the early part of the 19th century in Sheffield, the original city of steel. Established in 1838, they have over 175 years of experience which has given them an edge when it comes to product development, continually designing and developing kitchen essentials and accessories to fit any need. They have stood the test of time through an unrelenting dedication to quality, service and technical know-how in the design of knives.

🔪 A CHOICE GIFT: These eye-catching knives are a perfect addition to any kitchen for at-home chefs with a budding passion for cooking or those who prefer not to cook and simply want a sleek kitchen for their guests to admire. These knives are made to be as stylish as they are reliable so anyone you gift these tools to is sure to have a durable option in the kitchen for the foreseeable future and will thank you for years to come. Overall a great way to grow any kitchen collection.
